name: Get GL summary by Module Period Account Branch

content.query:
SELECT 
trim([Module]+'|'+[FinPeriodID]+'|'+acc.AccountCode+'|'+brn.BranchCode) as SearchKey
,[Module]
,[FinPeriodID]
,acc.AccountCode
,brn.BranchCode

,org.CompanyID
,org.CompanyName

--,acc.AccountClass
--,acc.AccountDescription

,sum(CreditAmount) as CreditAmount
,sum(DebitAmount) as DebitAmount
,sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount
,count(1) as LineCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION] gl
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT] acc
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH] brn
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION] org
 where 
 gl.AccountCode = acc.AccountCode
 and gl.BranchCode = brn.BranchCode
 and brn.CompanyID = org.CompanyID
 --and acc.AccountClass = 'EXOTHER'
 --and org.CompanyName = 'FHIA, LLC'
 --and gl.FinPeriodID in ('01-2022','02-2022','03-2022','04-2022','05-2022','06-2022','07-2022')
 and Posted = 'True'
 and acc.AccountCode in ('73004') --and GL_LINE_KEY = 'AP|234224|2'
 group BY
[Module]
,[FinPeriodID]
,acc.AccountCode
,brn.BranchCode
,org.CompanyID
,org.CompanyName
order by 
SearchKey
